target: 1. Reunion with Kaori
July 22
I'm sorry. For leaving for Tokyo all on my own...
I'm the one... who should be sorry. For not going to see you off...
Wh-Why am I crying so much...? I didn't intend to...
It's because of a dream I had recently...! A dream where I wouldn't be able to see you ever again, Shinpei.
That was a weird dream...
Huh…?
(I feel like I had the same dream... But could something like that really happen?)
That's enough of that.
Sis, weren't you going to hit Shin-chan?
Th-That's because...!!
...Because he came back obediently. I'll let him off the hook just this once.
Is it really just this once? You're actually happy to see Shin-chan, aren't you?
Wh... What are you talking about!? Don't say weird things.
Ah~, I suddenly got hungry. I'm heading back first!
--Hey, wait!
Hah, she's not honest at all...
Should we head back too?
Yeah...
By the way, Shin-chan, you sound like a real Tokyo boy!
Huh, me?
You've been totally influenced by over there, huh.
Influenced... I didn't mean to be, though.
Oh~, Shinpei-kun. You're back, huh.
Ah, hello.
(He's from the island's Chamber of Commerce. The girl with him... who is she?)
(She doesn't seem to be an island resident. Is she a tourist?)
It's been a while for you too, Mio-chan, hasn't it.
Yes, that's right.
Shinpei-kun, how long will you be here? If you'd like, show your face at the Chamber of Commerce.
Right, if I have time...

Um…
Could it be… Ajiro-kun?
Huh…?
Who... is this person?
What's this, Shinpei-kun, were you acquainted with her?
You're quite something, Shinpei-kun. To be acquainted with an active idol.
An idol!?
Ah, no, that's not it! We're not acquaintances or anything!
Ajiro-kun, um... do you not remember? We were classmates in elementary school...
Huh…?
(We were classmates in elementary school...)
U-Um, being stared at like that is... kind of embarrassing...
(This girl's atmosphere, I've seen it somewhere...)
You really don't remember, do you. We only talked a little bit in the library, after all.
(In the library...)
Ahh!? Could it be... Koyuba-san!?
Oh good, you remembered. Yes, I'm Kaori Koyuba.
I transferred schools during elementary school, so... I thought you would have forgotten about me by now.
So you were classmates back in elementary school. Impressive that you both remembered each other.
Y-Yeah. Well...
(Barely, though...)
Yeah, this must be fate too! Shinpei-kun, and Mio-chan, won't you lend us your wisdom as well?
Huh?
Wisdom?
Koyuba-san, you think that's a good idea too, right?
Eh? Ah, y-yes! It would be a huge help if you could lend us your strength!
U-Um.
I have no idea what you're talking about...
The town hall people will explain the details. Come on, Mio-chan, Shinpei-kun, let's go.
Hey, Shin-chan. What on earth is about to start?
That's what I want to know...
